classification.reasoning: The patch introduces a new internal index setting to mark indices as active or inactive based on shard status, modifies multiple classes to handle this new setting, and changes the logic for restoring and tracking indices in logical replication. It involves structural changes such as adding new methods, changing method signatures, and altering data flow to incorporate the new setting. The patch also includes updates to tests to cover the new behavior. The localization evidence shows a mix of exact matches and fuzzy matches, indicating some structural changes but not a complete redesign. Therefore, the patch complexity is best classified as TYPE_III (structural changes).

compile_errors.message: 'import' should be separated from previous line. [EmptyLineSeparator]

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of IndexMetadata to the imports list.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable usage of IndexMetadata type in the class for more precise metadata handling.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed iteration over concrete indices from strings to IndexMetadata objects, extracting index names explicitly before checking existence and invoking callback.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: method containing index existence check (likely in LogicalReplicationService)
hunk_descriptions.intent: To use richer metadata objects for more accurate and robust index handling instead of relying on string names alone.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added a new internal boolean index setting REPLICATION_INDEX_ROUTING_ACTIVE to mark an index as active (all primary shards active) for restoration purposes.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: LogicalReplicationSettings class, near other index settings declarations
hunk_descriptions.intent: To track and mark indices that are fully active and thus safe to restore or track during replication, filtering them appropriately on subscriber clusters.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Included the newly added REPLICATION_INDEX_ROUTING_ACTIVE setting in the list of non-replicated settings.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To ensure the new internal setting is excluded from replication to subscriber indices as it is only relevant locally.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of REPLICATION_INDEX_ROUTING_ACTIVE setting to the imports.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable usage of the new internal index setting in MetadataTracker for filtering or logic decisions.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed stream processing of concrete indices from strings to IndexMetadata objects, extracting index names explicitly for filtering and mapping to RelationName.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To improve accuracy and robustness by working with full IndexMetadata objects rather than just index name strings.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Refactored loop over concrete indices to use IndexMetadata objects; added logic to skip indices marked as inactive by REPLICATION_INDEX_ROUTING_ACTIVE setting; reordered checks to add relation names for state update before skipping inactive indices; added debug logging when skipping inactive indices.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: method handling indices restoration and state update in MetadataTracker
hunk_descriptions.intent: To prevent restoration attempts of indices that are not fully active (i.e., not all primary shards assigned), avoiding restore failures and improving replication stability.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of IndexMetadata to the imports list.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To support returning or processing IndexMetadata objects in this class.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed method concreteIndices() to return a list of IndexMetadata objects instead of just index name strings.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To provide richer metadata information about concrete indices for downstream processing.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added static import of REPLICATION_INDEX_ROUTING_ACTIVE and imports of additional classes including Function, IndexMetadata, Settings, and VisibleForTesting annotation.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To support new logic involving index settings and functional transformations on IndexMetadata within Publication class.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Removed the previous indexFilter predicate that checked if all primary shards are active by inspecting routing tables.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: method constructing filtered relations in Publication
hunk_descriptions.intent: To replace the previous shard activity check with a new approach embedded elsewhere, simplifying this method.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Refactored filtering of relations to remove indexFilter predicate and instead apply a new function applyCustomIndexSettings that marks indices with a custom setting indicating shard activity; added applyCustomIndexSettings method that annotates IndexMetadata with REPLICATION_INDEX_ROUTING_ACTIVE flag based on routing table shard activity.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: method returning filtered relations map; added applyCustomIndexSettings method
hunk_descriptions.intent: To centralize and formalize the marking of index activity status within IndexMetadata, enabling downstream components to rely on this flag rather than external predicates.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Replaced import of Predicate with import of Function to support functional transformations.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable passing functions that transform IndexMetadata objects rather than just predicates for filtering.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed fromMetadata method signature to accept a Function that applies custom transformations to IndexMetadata instead of a Predicate for filtering index names.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To allow applying custom index settings or modifications to IndexMetadata objects during construction of RelationMetadata instances.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Updated fromMetadata method to apply the provided Function to each concrete IndexMetadata before adding it to the list; skipped null indices; similarly applied the function to the main index metadata before returning.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To ensure all IndexMetadata instances used in RelationMetadata are consistently transformed (e.g., annotated with custom settings) before use.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of REPLICATION_INDEX_ROUTING_ACTIVE setting.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable filtering or logic based on the new internal index setting within the repository code.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Modified snapshot creation to filter concrete indices by the REPLICATION_INDEX_ROUTING_ACTIVE setting, only including indices marked as active in the snapshot info.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: method creating SnapshotInfo from publications state
hunk_descriptions.intent: To exclude inactive indices from snapshots, preventing restore attempts on indices that are not fully active and avoiding potential failures.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: When building index metadata for replication, removed the REPLICATION_INDEX_ROUTING_ACTIVE setting from the index settings before storing, treating it as a local marker not to be replicated.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: method building replicated index metadata in LogicalReplicationRepository
hunk_descriptions.intent: To prevent the internal active routing marker from being replicated to subscriber indices, as it is only relevant on the source cluster.
